articles.title: Peter Wolf left one Boston art school to form the J. Geils Band. Six decades later, he earned an honorary doctorate from another.
articles.description:
Wolf talked about painting, his upcoming record, a possible next book, the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame — and his honorary degree from MassArt.

The post Peter Wolf left one Boston art school to form the J. Geils Band. Six decades later, he earned an honorary doctorate from another. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Peter Wolf received an honorary doctorate from Massachusetts College of Art and Design on May 22, 2026.
Wolf discussed his music career, upcoming record, and potential book during the ceremony.
This recognition highlights Boston's vibrant arts community and its connection to rock history.

articles.title: Boston 25 hires Lauren Walsh for newly-created role
articles.description:
The Medford native previously served as a sports anchor and reporter in Nashville.

The post Boston 25 hires Lauren Walsh for newly-created role appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston 25 hires Medford native Lauren Walsh for a new position.
Walsh previously worked as a sports anchor in Nashville.
Her role aims to enhance local sports coverage for Boston residents.

articles.title: Tulsi Gabbard resigns as director of national intelligence, citing her husband’s health
articles.description:
There had been rumblings that Gabbard would split with Trump after the president's decision to strike Iran, which caused some division within his administration.

The post Tulsi Gabbard resigns as director of national intelligence, citing her husband’s health appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tulsi Gabbard resigns as director of national intelligence effective immediately due to her husband's health.
Gabbard's resignation may affect local political dynamics in Boston as she was a prominent figure.
Residents may see shifts in national security policies following her departure from the administration.
